<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardvark (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gī-hâi]][[de:Erde-Schwein]][[fr:Cochon de terre (Cycle sexagésimal chinois)]][[hak:Kí-hoi]][[ja:己亥]][[ko:기해]][[nds:Eer-Swien]][[vi:Kỷ Hợi]][[za:Geijhaih]][[zh-min-nan:Kí-hāi]][[zh-yue:己亥]][[zh:己亥]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardvark (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gī-hâi]][[de:Erde-Schwein]][[fr:Cochon de terre (Cycle sexagésimal chinois)]][[hak:Kí-hoi]][[ja:己亥]][[ko:기해]][[nds:Eer-Swien]][[vi:Kỷ Hợi]][[za:Geijhaih]][[zh-min-nan:Kí-hāi]][[zh-yue:己亥]][[zh:己亥]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardvark (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gī-hâi]][[de:Erde-Schwein]][[fr:Cochon de terre (Cycle sexagésimal chinois)]][[hak:Kí-hoi]][[ja:己亥]][[ko:기해]][[nds:Eer-Swien]][[vi:Kỷ Hợi]][[za:Geijhaih]][[zh-min-nan:Kí-hāi]][[zh-yue:己亥]][[zh:己亥]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Pig|kanji=己亥|romaji=tsuchinoto i|onyomi=kigai|p=jǐhài|w=chi-hai|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ xaɪ̯|y=gei2 hoi6|j=gei2 hoi6|ci=kei hɐi|mc=kɨj ɣəi|oc-bs=kɯʔ ɢəʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Earth Pig''', also known as '''Kigai''' (己亥, Tsuchinoto-i, Kidonoinoshishi, Kigai), is one of the elements in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 36th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Wu Xu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and preceding {{ill|Geng Zi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Zi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng Zi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem|1=Heavenly Stems}} {{ill|Ji|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ji|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branch|1=Earthly Branches}} {{ill|Pig (zodiac)|en|Pig (zodiac)|WD=Q877261|lt=Pig (亥)|1=Pig (zodiac)}} corresponds to Yin {{ill|Water (Wu Xing)|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Water (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Water (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|qq=}}, creating a {{ill|Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|ja|相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Elements#Mutual overcoming|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 五行思想|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Earth overcomes Water) relationship.

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Earth Pig (己亥)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐhài
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 hoi6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-i
***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-inoshishi
***Onyomi 1: kikai
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gihae (기해)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Hợi

<!--
==
* Yin Earth Pig (己亥) 
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐhài
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 hoi6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi: つちのといのしし (tsuchinoto-inoshishi)
***Onyomi: きかのいのしし (kika-no-inoshishi)
***Onyomi: きがい (kigai)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): gihae
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Hợi

-->
==Years of Yin Earth Pig==
Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 39 are considered Yin Earth Pig years.

{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Years of the Yin Earth Pig'''
|-
!{{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|WD=Q25868|lt=1st millennium|1=1st millennium}}!!{{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|WD=Q25860|lt=2nd millennium|1=2nd millennium}}!!{{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|WD=Q26224|lt=3rd millennium|1=3rd millennium}}
|-
|
* {{ill|39|en|39|WD=Q4636105|lt=39|1=39}}
* {{ill|99|en|99|WD=Q1166345|lt=99|1=99}}
* {{ill|159|en|159|WD=Q29976|lt=159|1=159}}
* {{ill|219|en|219|WD=Q31253|lt=219|1=219}}
* {{ill|279|en|279|WD=Q49170|lt=279|1=279}}
* {{ill|339|en|339|WD=Q47884|lt=339|1=339}}
* {{ill|399|en|399|WD=Q48150|lt=399|1=399}}
* {{ill|459|en|459|WD=Q30500|lt=459|1=459}}
* {{ill|519|en|519|WD=Q32899|lt=519|1=519}}
* {{ill|579|en|579|WD=Q33524|lt=579|1=579}}
* {{ill|639|en|639|WD=Q31701|lt=639|1=639}}
* {{ill|699|en|699|WD=Q23493|lt=699|1=699}}
* {{ill|759|en|759|WD=Q30532|lt=759|1=759}}
* {{ill|819|en|819|WD=Q30343|lt=819|1=819}}
* {{ill|879|en|879|WD=Q25001|lt=879|1=879}}
* {{ill|939|en|939|WD=Q23422|lt=939|1=939}}
* {{ill|999|en|999|WD=Q277307|lt=999|1=999}}
|
* {{ill|1059|en|1059|WD=Q19383|lt=1059|1=1059}}
* {{ill|1119|en|1119|WD=Q19540|lt=1119|1=1119}}
* {{ill|1179|en|1179|WD=Q19698|lt=1179|1=1179}}
* {{ill|1239|en|1239|WD=Q5434|lt=1239|1=1239}}
* {{ill|1299|en|1299|WD=Q5564|lt=1299|1=1299}}
* {{ill|1359|en|1359|WD=Q6143|lt=1359|1=1359}}
* {{ill|1419|en|1419|WD=Q6205|lt=1419|1=1419}}
* {{ill|1479|en|1479|WD=Q6620|lt=1479|1=1479}}
* {{ill|1539|en|1539|WD=Q6479|lt=1539|1=1539}}
* {{ill|1599|en|1599|WD=Q6803|lt=1599|1=1599}}
* {{ill|1659|en|1659|WD=Q6995|lt=1659|1=1659}}
* {{ill|1719|en|1719|WD=Q6902|lt=1719|1=1719}}
* {{ill|1779|en|1779|WD=Q7714|lt=1779|1=1779}}
* {{ill|1839|en|1839|WD=Q7616|lt=1839|1=1839}}
* {{ill|1899|en|1899|WD=Q7851|lt=1899|1=1899}}
* {{ill|1959|en|1959|WD=Q5302|lt=1959|1=1959}}
|
* {{ill|2019|en|2019|WD=Q25274|lt=2019|1=2019}}
* {{ill|2079|en|2079|WD=Q890584|lt=2079|1=2079}}
* [[:en:2139|2139]]
* [[:en:2199|2199]]
* [[:en:2259|2259]]
* [[:en:2319|2319]]
* [[:en:2379|2379]]
* [[:en:2439|2439]]
* {{ill|2499|en|2499|WD=Q97234703|lt=2499|1=2499}}
* [[2559]]
* [[2619]]
* [[2679]]
* [[2739]]
* [[2799]]
* [[2859]]
* [[:en:2919|2919]]
* [[:en:2979|2979]]
|}

==Months of Yin Earth Pig==
In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem|1=Heavenly Stems}} {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the {{ill|October|en|October|WD=Q124|lt=October|1=October}} of that year is considered a Yin Earth Pig month. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}, and in some cases, the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Lidong|1=Lidong}} to the day before {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Daxue|1=Daxue (solar term)}}) is used.

==Days of Yin Earth Pig==
=== Selection Days ===
Yin Earth Pig days are the 7th day of the {{ill|Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi Tenjō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

== References ==
{{Reflist|qq=}}

==See Also==
*{{prefix|qq=}}
*{{intitle|qq=}}

[[zh-min-nan:Teng-chháu]]
[[zh-yue:丁卯]]

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Earth Pig|qq=ja|己亥|version=84123815|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[cdo:Dĭng-cṳ̄de]]
[[nds:Wasser-Haseni]]
[[de:Yin Earth Pig]]

[[ja:己亥]]
[[zh:己亥]]
[[ko:기해]]
[[fr:Cochon de terre]]
[[de:Erde-Schwein]]

[[af:Waterhaas (astrologie)]]
[[de:Wasser-Hasenei]]
[[en:Water Rabbit]]
[[fr:Lièvre de eauboishak]]
[[it:Ding-chṳ́id]]

[[ko:정묘]]
[[vi:Đinh Mão]]
[[za:Dingceij]]
[[zh:丁卯]]
[[ar:Yin Earth Pig]]

<!--Yin Earth Pig--><!--Yin Earth Pig-->

<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Aardvark (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Gī-hâi]]
[[fr:Cochon de terre (Cycle sexagésimal chinois)]]
[[hak:Kí-hoi]]
[[nds:Eer-Swien]]
[[vi:Kỷ Hợi]]
[[za:Geijhaih]]
[[zh-min-nan:Kí-hāi]]
[[zh-yue:己亥]]
<!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Aardvark (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Gī-hâi]]
[[fr:Cochon de terre (Cycle sexagésimal chinois)]]
[[hak:Kí-hoi]]
[[nds:Eer-Swien]]
[[vi:Kỷ Hợi]]
[[za:Geijhaih]]
[[zh-min-nan:Kí-hāi]]
[[zh-yue:己亥]]
{{wikidata link|Q904335}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
